name: Amoo's Restaurant

notes: All 19 frozen rows were adjudicated: 16 location mismatches from Chopped NYC Ann Arbor and three exact current Amoo's matches.
The current working catalog contains 71 exact-address formulations across 13 categories, with beverages last; all 68 current formulations omitted from the frozen record were restored.

Six formulations are directly corroborated by the current official homepage; the remaining current catalog is corroborated by exact-address current vendor sources and separately labeled as non-official.
The 13 frozen official-ingredients rows all belonged to Chopped NYC and were removed.
Only Family Platter for 2 (bread: wheat/gluten) and Persian Saffron Ice Cream (cream/pistachio: milk/tree nut) have current restaurant-issued positive allergen wording.

The other 69 formulations remain officially unavailable. Third-party descriptions feed separately labeled Ingredient Intelligence only, and no mayContain claim is invented from the legacy broad gluten/nut statement.

Reviewed current restaurant identity, all six official featured formulations, the complete 71-row Nuxt delivery payload, current exact-address vendor corroboration, both menu images, both legacy PDFs, all 19 frozen source associations, authority boundaries, Ingredient Intelligence, and final generated fields.
Twelve focused tests pass; eight captured artifact hashes match; all 19 item evidence references resolve; and the generated target matches the reviewed snapshot on every core and inference field.

The target-only repair is idempotent at SHA-256 5116c5f18f714636985c943b8334d793632b926eba7d1b5fb40c2738567d9c04 and preserved all 1,494 non-target restaurants at SHA-256 613bdb0173df8ab911fbf7981f8e46f70181ff5fd759b13b9a2300d93c5321a8.

sourceAttempts.outcome: captured current exact identity and six featured formulations; found inert full-menu download buttons and a foreign Chopped NYC order link
current www PDF URLs returned HTTP 404; former Weebly-origin files remained accessible but were last modified in March/April 2024
notes: Legacy PDFs were captured as historical corroboration only.

sourceAttempts.outcome: business endpoints returned HTTP 403 and one visible official-site order link explicitly targeted Chopped NYC Ann Arbor
notes: No order.online content was accepted as Amoo's current evidence.

sourceAttempts.outcome: captured complete current exact-address catalog with 71 items in 13 categories
notes: All menu descriptions remain third-party and are not promoted to official.

sourceAttempts.outcome: browser-readable exact-address menu corroborated categories, featured formulations, prices, and current 2026 activity; ledger user-agent received HTTP 403
no current restaurant-issued allergen matrix, ingredient guide, or item-level cross-contact statement located
notes: Only two current first-party featured descriptions directly name top-allergen ingredients.

findings.summary: Sixteen of the 19 frozen Amoo's rows came from a Chopped NYC Ann Arbor ordering URL and belong to another restaurant.
findings.resolution: Removed all 16 location-mismatched Chopped NYC rows and quarantined their source association; none remains in Amoo's generated catalog.

findings.summary: The frozen record retained only three real Amoo's formulations and omitted 68 formulations from the current 71-row exact-address catalog.
findings.resolution: Replaced the three-row effective Amoo's catalog with 71 current formulations across 13 categories, restoring all 68 omitted current rows.

findings.summary: Thirteen frozen Chopped NYC rows were labeled official-ingredients for Amoo's, creating foreign milk/egg contains claims under the wrong restaurant.
findings.resolution: Removed every foreign milk/egg claim and recalculated official evidence strictly from current Amoo's first-party wording.

findings.summary: The current homepage advertises full-menu downloads without link targets, current www PDF paths return 404, and the surviving restaurant-issued PDFs are from 2024.
findings.resolution: Recorded the broken current links, retained the old restaurant-issued PDFs only as historical evidence, and based the complete working catalog on current exact-address vendor evidence without promoting its authority.

findings.summary: Only two of 71 current formulations have positive allergen wording on the restaurant-issued current homepage; all other current descriptions are third-party or historical.
findings.resolution: Limited official positive allergens to Family Platter for 2 and Persian Saffron Ice Cream; marked the other 69 current formulations officially unavailable and kept third-party cues separate.

findings.summary: Generic inference incorrectly treated suggested bread and an either-or vinegar/lemon description as fixed chimichurri ingredients, and risked treating barley itself as wheat.
findings.resolution: Suppressed fixed-allergen inference for Extra Chimichurri Sauce and represented Soupe Jo Kurdi barley as gluten-high while keeping noodle-derived wheat separate at medium confidence.

findings.summary: The frozen record carried only McLean, VA instead of the current complete street address.
findings.resolution: Set the display address to 6271 Old Dominion Dr, McLean, VA 22101.

repairs.summary: Removed 16 foreign Chopped NYC rows and their false official allergen claims, retained three real frozen Amoo's formulations, restored 68 omitted formulations, produced a 71-row current catalog with beverages last, limited official allergens to two first-party positive disclosures, preserved 69 unavailable rows, and corrected two Ingredient Intelligence edge cases.

notes: Current address: 6271 Old Dominion Dr, McLean, VA 22101.
The working current catalog contains 71 formulations across 13 categories; beverages are ordered last.
No safe dedicated audit worktree exists because the checkout remains dirty, so no checkpoint commit was created.
